topbar.tagline: Dealer in formal and corporate wear

footer.intro: Suitconcern is the B2B wholesaler in formal and corporate wear for retailers, menswear stores, bridal boutiques and corporate clients.

hero.label: Formal and corporate wear
hero.title:
Stylish.
Professional.
Reliable.
hero.subtitle: Suits, tuxedos and accessories for retailers and businesses. Fast delivery, competitive pricing and personal service — your reliable partner for formal and corporate wear.

warehouse.title: Wholesale specialist
warehouse.description: The trusted partner for formal and corporate wear for years.

tag.title: Extensive range
tag.description: Suits, tuxedos, jackets, waistcoats and accessories from stock.

truck.title: Fast delivery
truck.description: Never-out-of-stock core collection — ordered today, delivered fast.

ruler.title: Wide size range
ruler.description: From slim fit to extra-long sizes — the right fit for every customer.

collectionsSection.title: Our collections
collectionsSection.description: A carefully curated range for every occasion — from business to ceremony.

pakken.title: Suits
pakken.description: Business and formal suits in a broad size range.

smokings.title: Tuxedos
smokings.description: Classic and contemporary tuxedos for gala and ceremony.

colberts.title: Jackets
colberts.description: Separate jackets and blazers for a versatile look.

gilets.title: Waistcoats
gilets.description: Matching and separate waistcoats to complete any ensemble.

overhemden.title: Shirts
overhemden.description: Business and ceremony shirts in every collar and size.

accessoires.title: Accessories
accessoires.description: Ties, bow ties, pocket squares, braces and cufflinks.

bestsellers.title: Top sellers
bestsellers.description: The core collection our dealers order all year round.

about.title: A partner who thinks alongside you
about.description: We deliver more than just clothing — a considered purchasing programme tailored to what your customers ask for, backed by the assurance of stock and service.

voorraad.title: Never out of stock
voorraad.description: A fixed core collection always available from stock. Immediate replenishment, no seasonal risk and consistently the same reliable fit.

private.title: Your own brand
private.description: Bespoke garments and own labels with your branding. From label design to finishing — we produce under your name while preserving premium quality.

b2bCta.title: Ready to work together?
b2bCta.description: Request a B2B account and gain access to pricing, stock and complete ordering convenience. Approval is handled personally and promptly.

pages.collectiesHeroDescription: A carefully curated range of formal and corporate wear — always from stock, in an extensive size range.

listing.geenResultaten: No items found with these filters.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access is reserved for approved dealers. Once signed in, prices and stock become visible in the portal.
login.fout: Incorrect login details. Please check your email and password.
login.demo: Demo: login is not yet connected — this simulates an approved account.
login.lockLine: Prices and stock are only visible to approved accounts.

product.metaDescription: {name} ({color}, {fit}) by {brand}. {sku}. Sign in for prices and stock.

gate.pendingText: Your account is being reviewed. Once approved, you'll see prices and stock and be able to order.
gate.lockedText: Sign in or request a B2B account to view prices and stock and to order.

product.offerteHint: Request a quote for this item.
product.staffel: Tiered price: from {from} items {price} per item
product.geselecteerd: {count, plural, one {# item selected} other {# items selected}}

desc.p1: The {name} by {brand} combines a proven commercial fit with a refined finish. A {fit} silhouette in {color}, designed for both business and ceremonial occasions.
desc.p2: Part of the Suitconcern core collection and therefore continuously available from stock, with a wide size range and short replenishment times — so you never have to say no to your customer.

maatinfo.p1: The sizes follow standard European garment sizing. For suits and jackets the chest measurement applies; for shirts the collar size.
maatinfo.p2: Unsure about the right size distribution for your purchase? Our account managers are happy to advise you on a commercially balanced size breakdown per model.

leveringInfo.p1: Stock items are typically delivered within 1–3 working days. Orders placed before the daily cut-off ship the same day.
leveringInfo.p2: Delivery is carriage paid from the order value agreed with you. Replenishments and backorders are automatically topped up from the stock programme.

cart.title: Basket
cart.intro: Please review your selection and adjust the quantities before proceeding to checkout.
cart.gateText: Ordering and prices are available exclusively to a logged-in and approved B2B account. Please request an account or log in to view your basket.
cart.leegText: Browse the collections and add items to start an order.
cart.prijsExclNote: Prices are excl. VAT; your customer discount has already been applied.

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.leegText: Please add items to your basket before checking out.
checkout.gateText: Checkout and prices are available exclusively to a logged-in and approved B2B account. Please request an account or log in to complete your order.

shipping.standaardNote: 1–3 working days · to billing or delivery address
shipping.expressNote: Next working day · surcharge calculated at checkout
shipping.afhalenNote: Free · by appointment at the showroom

payment.invoiceNote: Only if activated for your account.

checkout.gegevensSub: Please enter your company and delivery address.
checkout.controleSub: Please review your order before placing it.
checkout.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while placing your order.
checkout.errorRetry: Something went wrong while placing your order. Please try again.
checkout.prijsExclNote: Prices are excl. VAT; your customer discount has already been applied.

quickOrder.title: Quick order
quickOrder.intro: Do you know the article numbers? Enter them below, choose a size and quantity, and add everything to your basket in one go.
quickOrder.gateText: Quick ordering by article number is available to approved B2B accounts. Please log in or request an account.
quickOrder.regelsToegevoegd: {count, plural, one {# row added to your basket.} other {# rows added to your basket.}}
quickOrder.geenGeldigeRegels: No valid rows found. Please check the article numbers and sizes.

bedankt.title: Thank you for your order
bedankt.text: You will receive a confirmation by email. We will process your order and keep you informed about the delivery. Thank you for placing your trust in Suitconcern.

guest.title: Log in to your account
guest.text: Pricing, stock and ordering are available to approved B2B accounts. Log in to open your dashboard, or request an account.

pending.title: Your account is under review
pending.text: Thank you for your request{namens}. Your account is being reviewed — once it has been approved, you will gain access to pricing, stock and the full ordering experience. Ordering is not yet available.
pending.text2: Approval is handled personally and usually within one working day. If you have any questions, you are always welcome to get in touch with us.

cards.ordersDesc: Track the status of your ongoing orders and deliveries.
cards.historieDesc: View and repeat previously placed orders.
cards.facturenDesc: Download your invoices and packing slips per order.
cards.downloadsDesc: Current catalogue, price lists and product data.
cards.favorietenDesc: Your saved items for a quick reorder.
cards.snelDesc: Add items by SKU and order in just a few clicks.
cards.herhaalDesc: Set up recurring orders for your standing range.

orders.dbText: Order history will be available once the database is connected.
orders.gateTitle: Log in to view your orders
orders.gateText: Your order history is available to approved B2B accounts. Log in or request an account.
orders.title: Orders
orders.intro: View your previous orders and place them again with a single click.
orders.leegText: Once you place an order, you will find it here.

favorieten.gateTitle: Log in to view your favourites
favorieten.gateText: Save items as favourites for a quick reorder. Log in with your approved B2B account or request one.
favorieten.title: Favourites
favorieten.intro: Your saved items for a quick reorder.
favorieten.leegText: Mark items with the heart to find them here.

vergeten.title: Forgotten password
vergeten.subtitle: Enter your email address. If it is known to us, we will send you a link to set a new password.
vergeten.succesText: If this email address is known to us, you will receive a link to set a new password. The link is valid for 72 hours.

instellen.title: Set password
instellen.subtitle: Choose a password for your Suitconcern account. You can then log in and access pricing, stock and ordering.
instellen.succesText: Your password has been saved. You can now log in to your account.
instellen.ongeldigText: This link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new one via “forgotten password”.

aanvraag.title: Request a B2B account
aanvraag.intro: Suitconcern is a closed wholesale operation. Pricing, stock and the ability to order become visible only after a personal review. Once submitted, your request is given the status Under review; as soon as we approve your account you will receive access to the full portal.
aanvraag.succesText: Your request now has the status Under review. Our team is reviewing your details and will usually contact you within one working day. You will receive a confirmation email at the address provided.
aanvraag.berichtPlaceholder: Tell us briefly about your business or any specific requirements.
aanvraag.mailNote: Once submitted, your request is given the status “Under review”. Email confirmation will follow as soon as the mail integration is live.
aanvraag.benefitPrijzenDesc: Net purchase prices and current stock by size and colour.
aanvraag.benefitBestellenDesc: Place orders directly in the portal, 24/7 and without intermediaries.
aanvraag.benefitHerhaalDesc: Place or top up previous orders again in a single click.
aanvraag.benefitStaffelDesc: Increasing discount based on your customer group and volume.
aanvraag.benefitCatalogusDesc: Complete collection with specifications and imagery.
aanvraag.benefitVoorraadDesc: Core collection available directly throughout the year.
aanvraag.stepIndienenDesc: Complete the form with your company and contact details.
aanvraag.stepBeoordelenDesc: We assess your request manually, usually within one working day.
aanvraag.stepToegangDesc: Once approved, you will receive login details and see pricing and stock.

contactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with Suitconcern. Visit our showroom, or call or email our team with any questions about our range, stock or a B2B account.
contactPage.heroText: Questions about our range, our stock or a B2B account? Get in touch or arrange a visit to our showroom — we are always glad to advise.
contactPage.introText: Our account managers know the market and will help you quickly. Drop by whenever you like, or book an appointment in advance.
contactPage.formIntro: Complete the form and we will be in touch within one working day.
contactPage.prototypeNote: This is a prototype form — messages are not yet sent or stored.

merken.metaDescription: A selection of leading brands in the Suitconcern range. From German craftsmanship to Italian cut — carefully chosen for quality and fit.
merken.heroText: We carry a selection of brands that have proven themselves in fit, quality and resale. Each one chosen because it meets the demands of the specialist retailer.
merken.sectionDescription: From classic ceremony to modern business — each brand adds to the range with a signature of its own.
merken.ctaTitle: View prices and stock by brand
merken.ctaText: Prices and current stock are visible to approved B2B accounts. Request access or log in to discover the full range.

overOns.metaDescription: Suitconcern is the B2B wholesaler in formal and corporate wear. A dependable partner for retailers and specialist shops, with stock assurance, an extensive size range and personal service.
overOns.heroText: We supply not just clothing, but a considered purchasing programme that matches what your customers are asking for — with the assurance of stock, a broad size range and service that goes beyond the order.
overOns.verhaalTitle: A partner who thinks along with you
overOns.verhaalDescription: Suitconcern grew out of a simple conviction: a specialist shop deserves a supplier that takes quality and stock as seriously as it takes the relationship.
overOns.verhaalP1: What began as specialist purchasing for formal and ceremonial wear grew into a full wholesale programme for suits, dinner jackets, blazers, waistcoats, shirts and accessories. Always with the same focus: proven fits, a reliable size range and a commercially sharp offering.
overOns.verhaalP2: By working closely with leading brands and managing our own stock tightly, we give retailers and specialist shops the assurance they need to resell without risk.
overOns.valueGroothandelDesc: For more than twenty years the dependable partner for menswear shops, bridal shops and businesses that build on certainty.
overOns.valueStockDesc: A considered core collection that is always available from stock, with immediate repeat deliveries and no seasonal risk.
overOns.valueMatenDesc: From slim fit to extra lengths and larger waist sizes — a fitting size for every customer, without long waits.
overOns.valueServiceDesc: A dedicated contact who knows your market and thinks along with you on range, margins and resale.
overOns.ctaText: Request a B2B account and gain access to prices, stock and complete ease of ordering. Prefer to get acquainted first? We are always glad to speak with you personally.

voorraad.metaDescription: The never-out-of-stock stock programme from Suitconcern: a fixed core collection that is always available, with immediate repeat deliveries and no seasonal risk.
voorraad.heroText: The stock programme is the backbone of your range: a fixed core collection that is always available from stock. Immediate repeat deliveries, no seasonal risk and always the same reliable fit.
voorraad.principeTitle: A core collection you can build on
voorraad.principeDescription: No sold-out sizes and no missed sales. Whatever sells, you simply reorder — keeping your rails full without having to hold large stocks yourself.
voorraad.principeP1: The stock programme is all about predictability. The models in the core collection remain available season after season, in the full size range. This way you invest in resale rather than in risk.
voorraad.step1Desc: Select the models, colours and sizes from the fixed range that suit your customer base.
voorraad.step2Desc: Order exactly the quantities you are selling now — no stock risk and no unnecessary purchasing.
voorraad.step3Desc: Sold out? Reorder the same day and receive your repeat delivery quickly from our central warehouse.
voorraad.voordelenTitle: What the programme delivers for you
voorraad.benefit1: Fixed core collection, available all year round
voorraad.benefit3: No seasonal risk or surplus lots
voorraad.benefit4: Consistent fit and quality per model
voorraad.benefit6: Order small and top up effortlessly
voorraad.categorieText: These categories form the core of the stock programme and are continuously available.
voorraad.ctaTitle: Keep your rails full at all times
voorraad.ctaText: Request a B2B account or log in to view the current stock and prices of the full programme.

privateLabel.metaDescription: Private label at Suitconcern: bespoke production and own labels with your branding. From label design and a dedicated size line to packaging — produced under your name.
privateLabel.heroTitle: Private label, entirely under your name
privateLabel.heroText: Bespoke production and own labels with your branding. From label design and a dedicated size line to packaging — we produce under your name while maintaining premium quality.
privateLabel.maatwerkDescription: With private label you turn our craftsmanship into a collection of your own. You set the look, we take care of the production, the fit and the stock.
privateLabel.maatwerkP1: Whether you want to extend an existing line with a brand of your own or launch an entirely new label — we will think along with you on design, materials and the size line that suits your customer.
privateLabel.offerLabelsDesc: Your brand name on neck, size and care labels, finished to your house style.
privateLabel.offerOntwerpDesc: We handle the design of labels and details that suit the look of your brand.
privateLabel.offerMaatlijnDesc: A size line tailored to your customer base, including fits and lengths.
privateLabel.offerVerpakkingDesc: Garment covers, hang tags and packaging under your name, ready for the shop floor.
privateLabel.procIntakeDesc: We discuss your brand, target audience, preferred fits and quantities.
privateLabel.procOntwerpDesc: Labels, size line and finishing are developed and submitted for approval.
privateLabel.procProductieDesc: Production under your name, with the premium quality you have come to expect from us.
privateLabel.procLeveringDesc: Delivered shop-ready, with clear arrangements for repeat deliveries.
privateLabel.benefitMerkTitle: A distinctive brand of your own
privateLabel.benefitMerkDesc: Build brand value with collections that stand entirely under your own name.
privateLabel.benefitPasvormDesc: A size line that aligns exactly with your customer base and market segment.
privateLabel.benefitProductieDesc: Proven craftsmanship and materials, with no compromise on quality.
privateLabel.benefitNaleveringDesc: Clear arrangements on stock and repeat deliveries, just as with our programme.
privateLabel.ctaText: Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation about your own private label collection. We are always glad to advise.
